# hetzner_wol (Ephemeral Resource)

Sends a Wake on LAN packet to a server. This is an ephemeral resource that triggers a one-time action and does not persist state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (Number) The server number to wake.

### Read-Only

- `server_ip` (String) Server main IPv4 address (returned after WoL).
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) Server IPv6 network (returned after WoL).
